subcodes.first_line: We have hearkened unto thy call, and We answer thee through this perspicuous Book. By the life of God! A single word thereof surpasseth all treasures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و نجیبک بهذا الکتاب المبین لعمر الله لایعادل بکلمه منه کنوز
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
